metadata.dc:title: Vorticity-Driven Lateral Spread Ensemble Data Set
metadata.dc:creator: Divya Banesh, Rodman Ray Linn, John M Patchett
metadata.dc:subject: Analysis of Wildfire spread
metadata.dc:description: This ensemble data set presents the study of wildfires, and more specifically, the phenomena known as vorticity-driven lateral spread (VLS) [1], in wildfires of mountain and canyon topographies.
metadata.dc:publisher: IEEE Vis, 2022-10-23 (Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, United States)
metadata.dc:contributor: Divya Banesh, Rodman Ray Linn, John M Patchett
metadata.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2021, Triad National Security, LLC. All rights reserved.
